case_title: SOL SORIANO VS. LUXOR CAB, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 - - FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT - FILED BY SORIANO, SOL AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. (OWNER) DOE 1, DRIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF SOL SORIANO RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SORIANO, SOL
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SORIANO, SOL AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. (OWNER) YAN, BING
DOE 1, DRIVER IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. (OWNER)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-25-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LUXOR AND BING YAN PRESENT BUT DO NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00- SERVED FEB-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. (OWNER)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FPR SERVICE $35.00 SERVED FEB-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, BING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. (OWNER)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. "THE TWO YEAR STATUTESTE OF LIMITATIONS ON PERSONAL INJURY CLAIMS BARS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICK LARSEN--CLAIMS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
